rule: Document-level split at the client-project level: every document belonging to the same real client/project lands in the same split (TEST/DEV/TRAIN), matched by client-name occurrence in filename/content, never by filename-string coincidence alone (each carry-along below was content-verified). TEST is additions-only from here forward (removals are not allowed per RULES/T3 gotcha).

client_name_carry_alongs.data/specifications/Specifications/Copy: SAEL (client-name match; PDF rendering of same enquiry as sacred10 08_sael)

Mahan Energen Ltd / Tata Consulting Engineers — 2x800MW Mahan Ultra Supercritical Thermal Power Project. No gold, no rowgold, no output/batch_extractions entry, no annotations/verified entry. 3 mined-gazetteer term hits, all generic boilerplate phrases ('AIR-CONDITIONING DUCT', 'Application of insulation') independently verified present in >=1 spec1 (TRAIN) document each -> not TEST-exclusive, no removal needed.
new_spec2_picks.data/specifications/Specification 2/Spec: Gujarat Biotechnology Research Centre / Doshi Consultants Pvt Ltd. No gold/rowgold/extraction/verified entry. 2 mined-gazetteer hits ('Application of Insulation'/'insulation'), confirmed present in >=1 spec1 TRAIN doc -> not TEST-exclusive.
new_spec2_picks.data/specifications/Specification 2/Acco: Client/project 'DCS High Side Project'. No gold/rowgold/extraction/verified entry. 1 mined-gazetteer hit ('Absorption Coefficient'), confirmed present in 7 spec1 TRAIN docs -> not TEST-exclusive.
new_spec2_picks.data/specifications/Specification 2/Copy: Client/project 'Bioltus, Valsad, Proj-1017'. No gold/rowgold/extraction/verified entry. Zero mined-gazetteer term hits.
new_spec2_picks.data/specifications/Specification 2/MECH: Client 'NXTRA' via EIPL. No gold/rowgold/extraction/verified entry. boq_bearing doc (Sr.No/Description/Unit/Qty buffer-tank line item) — adds BOQ-table diversity to the TEST addition set. 2 mined-gazetteer hits ('Anergy / Sevcon / Ensaviour / NES', 'Based on the Insulation') verified ABSENT from every spec1 TRAIN doc -> genuinely TEST-exclusive -> BOTH REMOVED from data/ontology/insulation_gazetteer_mined.json materials list (see results/gazetteer_provenance_audit.md).
